name: liquidtrashbutton
title: Liquid Trash Button
description: A "God-Tier" Destructive Action Button. Features: - Liquid Morphing: The button body physically morphs into a trash bin. - Multi-stage Sequence: Open lid -> Liquid drop -> Close lid -> Success. - Auto-Reset: Smoothly returns to original state after completion. - Spatial Audio: Synchronized sequence of 3D audio cues.
